response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is entirely in full-stack web, mobile, and embedded software development with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and contribute to open-source infrastructure projects
Demonstrated teaching and workshop leadership in software development practices
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture for AI accelerators
No exposure to deep-learning workload optimization or GPU performance analysis
Lacks required background in hardware-software co-design or system-level performance modeling
